title: Build a Hermes Knowledge Base That Self-Improves
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to construct a self-improving knowledge base for Hermes AI agents by combining an Obsidian wiki with Claude and NotebookLM. The workflow implements Karpathy's LLM wiki principles and uses cron jobs and Granola to automatically ingest meeting notes, emails, and research into the agent's memory system.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through building a self-improving knowledge base for Hermes AI agents by pairing an Obsidian wiki with Claude and NotebookLM. The build applies Karpathy's LLM wiki principles and wires in cron jobs and Granola to automatically pull meeting notes, emails, and research into the agent's memory. The result is an ingestion pipeline that keeps agent memory current without manual updates, drawing on RAG and knowledge graph structures to organize what gets stored.
